parameters.query: SELECT id, lot_id AS lot, name, ical_url, base_price FROM apartments WHERE active = TRUE AND ical_url IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id;

INSERT INTO bookings (id, apartment_id, apartment_name, checkin_at, checkout_at, notes, source, status, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.apartment_id }}-{{ $json.start }}',
  '{{ $json.apartment_id }}',
  '{{ ($json.apartment_name || '').replace(/\'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.start }}'::date,
  '{{ $json.end }}'::date,
  '{{ (($json.summary || '').toString().trim() || 'iCal RealtyCalendar').replace(/\'/g, "''") }}',
  'realtycalendar-ical',
  'confirmed',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  apartment_id   = EXCLUDED.apartment_id,
  apartment_name = EXCLUDED.apartment_name,
  checkin_at     = EXCLUDED.checkin_at,
  checkout_at    = EXCLUDED.checkout_at,
  notes          = EXCLUDED.notes,
  source         = EXCLUDED.source,
  status         = EXCLUDED.status,
  updated_at     = NOW();
